scripts.build: astro build && esbuild src/background.ts --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/background.js && esbuild src/content.ts --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/content.js
scripts.test: pnpm run build && NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation web-ext run -s dist
scripts.test:firefox: pnpm run build && NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation web-ext run -t firefox-desktop -s dist
scripts.test:chromium: pnpm run build && NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation web-ext run -t chromium -s dist
scripts.zip: pnpm run build && zip -r my-pantry.zip dist/
